meta.tagline: Premium tarantulas, raised right — in Montreal.
meta.defaultDescription: Montreal Spider Co. is Quebec's premium tarantula specialist. Captive-bred, TarantulApp Verified Origin spiders with pickup points and metro meetups across Montreal.
meta.ogAlt: Montreal Spider Co. — gold and black company seal

pickup.title: Pickup / Meetup
pickup.tooltip: Free partner pickup points, metro station meetups ($12–$25 by area on our interactive map), or a custom location — coordinated after checkout.

distributor.title: Authorized distributor
distributor.tooltip: An independent partner shop that stocks our spiders on-site. Visit them directly — separate from online checkout.

home.heroSub: Captive-bred, ethically raised, and TarantulApp Verified Origin. Discover docile beginners and jaw-dropping rarities — ready for pickup or meetup across Montreal.
home.featuredSub: A rotating selection of our healthiest, most striking slings and juveniles.
home.why1Body: Every spider is captive-bred and raised in climate-controlled enclosures. No wild-caught, no compromises.
home.why2Body: Proudly certified — each specimen ships with a traceable certificate of legitimate origin and husbandry.
home.why3Body: Free collection at partner pickup points, or meet us at a metro station — pick your area and station on our interactive map at checkout (from $12).
home.why4Body: Free care sheets, molt check-ins and a real human to message when you have questions.
home.beginnerBody: Docile, hardy, forgiving. The perfect first eight legs.
home.intermediateBody: Faster, flashier, a little more attitude.
home.ctaTitle: Ready to meet your first tarantula?
home.ctaBody: Start with a beginner-friendly sling, or message us — we'll match you to the perfect spider.
home.newsletterBody: New arrivals, restocks and care tips. No spam — we promise.
home.newsletterThanks: You're on the list. Welcome to the web.

verified.title: Proudly Verified Origin
verified.subtitle: Montreal Spider Co. is a TarantulApp Verified Origin partner — independent proof that our spiders are legitimately sourced, captive-bred and properly cared for.
verified.whatBody: Verified Origin is TarantulApp's certification standard. It traces each tarantula from breeder to keeper, confirming captive-bred lineage, ethical husbandry, and accurate species identification.
verified.point1Body: No wild-caught specimens. Every spider's lineage is documented and captive-bred.
verified.point2Body: Housing, feeding and molt records are reviewed against TarantulApp husbandry standards.
verified.point3Body: Species and locality are confirmed, so you always know exactly what you're keeping.
verified.point4Body: Each specimen ships with a scannable digital certificate tied to its TarantulApp record.
verified.step1: Find the certificate ID on your order confirmation.
verified.step2: Open TarantulApp and search the Verified Origin registry.
verified.step3: Confirm the species, breeder and husbandry record match your spider.

delivery.title: Pickup & Meetup
delivery.subtitle: Collect your order at a partner pickup point, meet us at a metro station, or request a custom location — coordinated after checkout.
delivery.localBody: Your spiders are transported in insulated, climate-stable packaging and handed to you in person. Delivery windows are arranged after your order is placed.
delivery.pickupMeetupBody: Prefer to collect in person? At checkout, choose pickup / meetup and pick the option that works for you:
delivery.pickupOptionPoint: Pickup point — free collection at a trusted partner during their hours.
delivery.pickupOptionMetro: Metro station meetup — pick your area and station on our interactive map (Mon–Sat, 9:30 AM–4:30 PM). Fees from $12 (Southwest) to $25 (Laval & South Shore); free over $75–$200 by area.
delivery.pickupOptionCustom: Custom meetup request — suggest another location; we will confirm any extra fee before fulfilling.
delivery.pickupMeetupCoordination: Pickup / Meetup times are coordinated after your order is placed. Metro station meetups are available Monday to Saturday between 9:30 AM and 4:30 PM. Most orders are coordinated within 3–7 days, depending on order volume and animal safety.
delivery.metroBody: At checkout, use our interactive metro map or list to choose your area, line, and station. Meetup is free when your order subtotal meets the threshold for that area.
delivery.metroMapNote: Use the interactive map or station list at checkout to select your meetup point. Custom meetup locations outside these stations are quoted manually.
delivery.metroMapExplore: Tap or click a station to preview area and fees. Selection at checkout uses the same map.
delivery.pickupPointsBody: Free hand-off at our partner locations. Once your order is ready, you have a limited window to collect — see the policy below.
delivery.pickupBody: Free collection at trusted local partners. Choose a pickup point at checkout and we'll message you when your order is ready.
delivery.liveArrivalBody: Every pickup and meetup is covered by our live arrival guarantee. In the rare event of an issue, we make it right.
delivery.distributorsBody: Some species are also stocked at partner shops across Montreal. Look for the badge in the shop, or visit a distributor directly.
delivery.outsideBody: We're expanding. Message us with your location and we'll let you know when we reach you.

pickupPoints.title: Pickup / Meetup
pickupPoints.subtitle: Three ways to collect your order in person — partner pickup points, metro station meetups, or a custom location on request.
pickupPoints.body1: At checkout, choose pickup / meetup and select what fits you. Pickup points are free partner hand-off locations. Metro meetups use an interactive map: Southwest Montreal ($12, free over $75), Central ($15 / $125), North & East ($20 / $150), or Laval & South Shore ($25 / $200) — Monday to Saturday, 9:30 AM–4:30 PM. Custom meetup requests are quoted manually before we fulfill your order.
pickupPoints.body2: Pickup points are not pet shops selling our spiders off the shelf. They are secure hand-off partners we work with across Montreal and the surrounding area. Metro and custom meetups are coordinated after your order is placed, usually within 3–7 days.

authorizedDistributors.title: What is an authorized distributor?
authorizedDistributors.subtitle: Independent shops that stock Montreal Spider Co. spiders on-site — visit them directly to buy in person.
authorizedDistributors.body1: Authorized distributors carry selected species from our collection in their own inventory. Stock at a distributor is separate from our online shop and central preparation.
authorizedDistributors.body2: Look for the "At authorized distributor" badge on product cards in our shop. Hover to see which partners carry that species and their contact details.

about.title: Born in Montreal, built on care
about.lead: Montreal Spider Co. started with a simple belief: tarantulas deserve to be understood, not feared — and keepers deserve healthy, ethically raised spiders.
about.body1: We're a Lachine-based specialist breeder and shop. Every spider in our care is captive-bred, raised in climate-controlled enclosures, and tracked from egg sac to your enclosure. We don't deal in wild-caught animals, ever.
about.body2: As a TarantulApp Verified Origin partner, we hold ourselves to an independent standard of provenance and welfare. When you buy from us, you get more than a spider — you get its full story.
about.value1Body: Healthy, well-fed, properly housed spiders — no shortcuts.
about.value2Body: We help people understand these incredible animals.
about.value3Body: Based in Lachine with pickup points and metro meetups across Montreal — Southwest, Central, North & East, and Laval & South Shore.
about.fact1: No tarantula has venom dangerous to a healthy human. A bite is comparable to a bee sting.
about.fact2: Most are shy and defensive at worst. Many beginner species are remarkably docile.
about.fact3: Tarantulas are low-maintenance — clean water, the odd feeder, and the right enclosure.

care.title: Care Guides
care.subtitle: Everything you need to keep a thriving, healthy tarantula — written by keepers, for keepers.

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.subtitle: Questions about a species, your order, or which spider suits you? We're real people and we love to talk spiders.
contact.sent: Thanks! We'll reply within one business day.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything about ordering, delivery, pickup / meetup, and keeping your new spider happy.
faq.a1: No tarantula has venom medically dangerous to a healthy human. A bite is comparable to a bee sting, and most species would much rather flee than bite. Our beginner species are chosen for their calm temperament.
faq.q2: How do you get spiders to customers?
faq.a2: We coordinate pickup / meetup after checkout — free collection at a partner pickup point, a metro station meetup on our interactive map ($12–$25 by area; free over $75–$200), or a custom location on request. Every pickup and meetup is covered by our live arrival guarantee.
faq.q3: What does TarantulApp Verified Origin mean?
faq.a3: It's an independent certification confirming your spider is captive-bred, legitimately sourced and properly cared for. Each specimen ships with a traceable digital certificate.
faq.a4: Absolutely — it's our favourite thing. Filter the shop by 'Beginner' or message us and we'll match you to a hardy, docile first spider, complete with a care guide.
faq.a5: Your spider, its Verified Origin certificate, a species-specific care sheet, and lifetime access to our keeper support.
faq.q6: How often do I need to feed and clean?
faq.a6: Most tarantulas eat every few days to a couple of weeks depending on age and species, and enclosures need only occasional spot-cleaning. They're famously low-maintenance.
faq.q7: Can I cancel or change my order?
faq.a7: Yes — contact us before your pickup / meetup is scheduled and we'll sort it out.
faq.q8: What pickup / meetup options do you offer?
faq.a8: At checkout, choose pickup / meetup: free collection at a partner pickup point; metro station meetup via our interactive map (Mon–Sat 9:30 AM–4:30 PM) — Southwest $12 (free over $75), Central $15 ($125), North & East $20 ($150), Laval & South Shore $25 ($200); or a custom meetup location (we confirm any extra fee before fulfilling). Times are coordinated after your order, usually within 3–7 days.

payments.homeBody: Bring home your spider — and its setup — today and split the cost into 4 interest-free instalments. Just choose Klarna when you check out through our secure Stripe payment.
payments.homePoint1Body: Four equal payments, two weeks apart — always interest-free.
payments.homePoint2Body: Choosing Klarna at checkout won't affect your credit score.
payments.homePoint3Body: Handled by Stripe and Klarna — we never see your card or banking details.
payments.disclaimer: Subject to eligibility. Klarna options and full terms are shown at checkout.

footer.blurb: Quebec's premium tarantula specialist. Captive-bred, Verified Origin, ready for pickup or meetup across Montreal.
